DescribeSpecs.filters: Filter conditions, see Appendix Filter. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic; multiple values within a filter are combined with OR logic. Supported fields: - name=managedMode, filter by deployment type, e.g. value=["FullyManaged"]; - name=metaSpec, filter by metadata spec, e.g. value=["M2"]; - name=dataSpec, filter by data spec, e.g. value=["Basic"]
DescribeSpecs.filters.name: The field to filter on. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic. Example: zone
DescribeSpecs.filters.values: The filter values for the field. Multiple values are combined with OR logic. Example: ["zoneA", "zoneB"]
